text:
The Season 1 Part 1 box set of the original Fullmetal Alchemist anime series was released by Funimation on September 18, 2007. It contains sixteen episodes on four discs:
Volume 1: The Curse
Episode 1: Those Who Challenge the Sun
Episode 2: Body of the Sanctioned
Episode 3: Mother
Episode 4: A Forger's Love
Volume 2: Scarred Man of the East
Episode 5: The Man with the Mechanical Arm
Episode 6: The Alchemy Exam
Episode 7: Night of the Chimera's Cry
Episode 8: The Philosopher's Stone
Volume 3: Equivalent Exchange
Episode 9: Be Thou for the People
Episode 10: The Phantom Thief
Episode 11: The Other Brothers Elric, part one
Episode 12: The Other Brothers Elric, part two
Volume 4: The Fall of Ishbal
Episode 13: Fullmetal vs. Flame
Episode 14: Destruction's Right Hand
Episode 15: The Ishbal Massacre
Episode 16: That Which Is Lost

Synopsis

As children, brothers Edward and Alphonse used the clandestine science of Alchemy to try the unthinkable: resurrect their dead mother. They failed, unleashing an alchemic reaction that ripped their bodies apart.

Four years later, Ed and Al are combing the country for a rumored stone that could amplify their alchemy and bring their bodies back to normal. And it appears they may have found it - in a strangely prosperous desert village.
